items.title: Multiple MSRs proposed for French industrial park
items.blurb: French molten salt reactor developer Stellaria has signed a memorandum of understanding with Unitel Group and Energie Hub to develop an integrated energy hub in the Fos-sur-Mer area of southern France.

items.title: Amentum selected for Savannah River AI project
items.blurb: The US Department of Energy's National Nuclear Security Administration has chosen Amentum to enter negotiations for a phased lease to develop an artificial intelligence data centre with 2 GWe of dedicated on-site energy…

items.title: Four US microreactors hit criticality milestone
Global nuclear M&A deals 'double to USD7 billion'
items.blurb: The value of mergers and acquisitions involving the global nuclear industry in the first half of 2026 doubled to USD7 billion compared with a year earlier, according to research by law firm White & Case LLP.
